App interface is bad after this latest update. in mutual fund Dashboard section daily and overall profit were shown in Green Colour and Loss were Shown in Red Colour Font. Which was very convenient and clear. But after update Both Profit and Loss are showing in White colour font which is very confusing. Before this we were able to find profit and Loss very easily, only by seeing green & red colour. But not now. I request you to please Fix this issue as soon as possible.

clusters.label: User Friendly Interface
sample_quotes: I've had a great experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs very convenient, even for beginners. The interface is clean, transactions are smooth, and account management is hassle-free. I also appreciate the timely notifications, easy-to-understand investment insights, and quick customer support. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommended!

pulse.summary: Users flagged friction across the top themes this week. Investigate the most-cited issues and prioritise fixes for the next sprint.
pulse.recommendation: Investigate and patch the high brokerage fees issues (67 reviews) before next release.

feedback.text: they are charges too much brokerages.. and customer care not respond properly.. mera 35050 amount inlogo ki wajah se hold ho gaya ye claim karte hai instant receive but mujhe 27 hours ho gaya wo bhi working days par fir bhi amount receive nahi huva.. third class service.. customer ke paise hold kar dete hai small amount instant received ho jata hai jaise hi aap big amount withdrawal karoge hold ho jayega.. i suggest don't use it switched to other platform..

I've had a great experience using Groww. The app is simple, user-friendly, and makes investing in stocks, mutual funds, and IPOs very convenient, even for beginners. The interface is clean, transactions are smooth, and account management is hassle-free. I also appreciate the timely notifications, easy-to-understand investment insights, and quick customer support. Overall, Groww is a reliable platform for anyone looking to start or grow their investment journey. Highly recommended!
nice app & transection very fast and no issues this is a good app for trading

mar jana per grow aap mai trading maat karna ye aap mai dikta kuch aur hai aur hota kuch aur hai late response profit mai close karoge toh lose mai close hota hai ek dam faltu aap hai...😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡😡

bullets: Stock delivery trades on Groww incur Rs 20 or 0.1% (whichever is lower) per executed order. [1]
Intraday and F&O trades are charged Rs 20 per executed order, plus statutory levies. [3]
Mutual funds direct plans on Groww have zero commission and no transaction fees. [2]
Exit load is a mutual-fund-house charge for redeeming units inside the lock-in window — Groww does not earn this. [2]
Demat AMC for stock investors is billed annually after the first year, separate from per-trade brokerage. [3]
GST, SEBI turnover fee, STT and stamp duty are statutory levies passed through unchanged on every trade. [3]

decision.move: Ship a brokerage transparency banner inside the order flow
decision.why: "High Brokerage Fees" emerged this week (n=67, avg ★2.2). First time it's appeared in the top themes.
decision.impact: Addresses ~7% of weekly review volume (67 reviews) — projected NPS impact +7.5
